From: billing@megacloud.example
To: procurement@customercorp.example
Date: November 15, 2025
Subject: Re: Loyalty Discount Renewal for 2026

Hi team,

Following up on our call last week. Confirming that MegaCloud will
extend the ten percent (10%) loyalty discount under Amendment 1 through
December 31, 2026, effective January 1, 2026. Please treat this email as
an executed amendment to the Agreement. This is permitted per Section 9.1
of the MSA, which allows amendment by executed email exchange between
authorized representatives.

Let us know if you have any questions.

Best,
Alex Rivera
Director of Billing, MegaCloud Inc.

---

From: procurement@customercorp.example
To: billing@megacloud.example
Date: November 15, 2025
Subject: Re: Re: Loyalty Discount Renewal for 2026

Confirmed and agreed on our end. Thank you, Alex.

Jamie Chen
VP Procurement, Customer Corp.
